texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: The ultimate safari experience REIMAGINED
texts.text: The ultimate safari experience REIMAGINED

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Ishara is the Swahili word for 'sign', and in this majestic part of the world, nature invites you to embrace each moment as a sign.
texts.text: Ishara is the Swahili word for 'sign', and in this majestic part of the world, nature invites you to embrace each moment as a sign.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Uniquely situated in one of the most sought-after locations in the Masai Mara National Reserve, Ishara is an immersive luxury experience steeped in intense African splendour. From the moment you  step  across  our  threshold,  you  will  enter  a  world  of  breathtaking  landscapes  and  mindful hospitality, where adventure melds with sustainable luxury and the wild heart of nature beats in harmony with serene comfort.
texts.text: Uniquely situated in one of the most sought-after locations in the Masai Mara National Reserve, Ishara is an immersive luxury experience steeped in intense African splendour. From the moment you  step  across  our  threshold,  you  will  enter  a  world  of  breathtaking  landscapes  and  mindful hospitality, where adventure melds with sustainable luxury and the wild heart of nature beats in harmony with serene comfort.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Meticulously  reimagined  in  every  aspect,  Ishara  beckons  with  a  blend  of  the  familiar  and  the magical, offering a gateway to not just witness, but truly live the pulse of the wilderness in a sanctuary that's been reborn, ready to unveil its secrets once more.
texts.text: Meticulously  reimagined  in  every  aspect,  Ishara  beckons  with  a  blend  of  the  familiar  and  the magical, offering a gateway to not just witness, but truly live the pulse of the wilderness in a sanctuary that's been reborn, ready to unveil its secrets once more.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: A labyrinth  of  pathways  now  weave  through  the  very  essence  of  the  camp.  As  you  meander across bridges and elevated walkways that soar through the lush tree canopies, the forest comes alive in a symphony of sights, sounds, and scents. Every direction you turn invites you to engage with nature in an intimate, immersive manner, transcending the typical safari and propelling you into the sublime.
texts.text: A labyrinth  of  pathways  now  weave  through  the  very  essence  of  the  camp.  As  you  meander across bridges and elevated walkways that soar through the lush tree canopies, the forest comes alive in a symphony of sights, sounds, and scents. Every direction you turn invites you to engage with nature in an intimate, immersive manner, transcending the typical safari and propelling you into the sublime.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Passionate  attention  to  detail  has  been  put  into  designing,  selecting,  and  curating  each component of the Ishara experience. Our interior finishes and décor draw inspiration from a rich tapestry of African design. Craft is reinterpreted; prints are redefined, and texture elevated to create a backdrop where the echoes of the past are retold to reflect the contemporary.
texts.text: Passionate  attention  to  detail  has  been  put  into  designing,  selecting,  and  curating  each component of the Ishara experience. Our interior finishes and décor draw inspiration from a rich tapestry of African design. Craft is reinterpreted; prints are redefined, and texture elevated to create a backdrop where the echoes of the past are retold to reflect the contemporary.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Our team are the heart and soul of Ishara and are dedicated to providing the highest levels of service  to  our  guests.  We  are  committed  to  excellence  and  to  making  your  stay  not  only memorable, but truly unforgettable.
texts.text: Our team are the heart and soul of Ishara and are dedicated to providing the highest levels of service  to  our  guests.  We  are  committed  to  excellence  and  to  making  your  stay  not  only memorable, but truly unforgettable.

texts.orig: Get t ing t o Ishar a
texts.text: Get t ing t o Ishar a

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Our location is comfortably accessible by road or air, only 262km from Nairobi by car or a short flight to the Mara's Olkiombo airstrip , 5km away. Your adventure starts upon arrival with your  personal  guide  meeting  you  at  the  airstrip  or  at Sekenani  Gate .Google  Maps:  Ishara
texts.text: Our location is comfortably accessible by road or air, only 262km from Nairobi by car or a short flight to the Mara's Olkiombo airstrip , 5km away. texts.orig: Mara
texts.text: Mara

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Ishara was built to accommodate an array of travelers with different wishes and needs. Whether you  are  a  solo  traveler  or  part  of  a  group,  and  whether  you  are  seeking  exhilaration  or relaxation, we have a breathtaking space for you to experience everything you desire. With seven River Suites, two Family Suites, one Villa Suite, and one Starbed, Ishara was created to provide joy, adventure, reflection, and serenity to all who enter.
texts.text: Ishara was built to accommodate an array of travelers with different wishes and needs. Whether you  are  a  solo  traveler  or  part  of  a  group,  and  whether  you  are  seeking  exhilaration  or relaxation, we have a breathtaking space for you to experience everything you desire. With seven River Suites, two Family Suites, one Villa Suite, and one Starbed, Ishara was created to provide joy, adventure, reflection, and serenity to all who enter.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Our  open-plan  suites  are  thoughtfully  placed  on  the  brink  of  the  wild,  amidst  the  existing ecology. Immerse yourself in the natural environment with unobstructed views of the river, forest, and expansive savanna from every corner of the spacious room and outdoor deck.
texts.text: Our  open-plan  suites  are  thoughtfully  placed  on  the  brink  of  the  wild,  amidst  the  existing ecology. Immerse yourself in the natural environment with unobstructed views of the river, forest, and expansive savanna from every corner of the spacious room and outdoor deck.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Each River Suite (103m 2 ) offers a King or two Twin beds.
texts.text: Each River Suite (103m 2 ) offers a King or two Twin beds.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · The Villa Suite (379m 2 ) consists of two River Suites around a central lounge and dining area encompassing a private sundeck, an infinity pool and firepit. This suite accommodates up to four adults sharing.
texts.text: The Villa Suite (379m 2 ) consists of two River Suites around a central lounge and dining area encompassing a private sundeck, an infinity pool and firepit. This suite accommodates up to four adults sharing.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Each Family Suite (168m 2 ) consists of two inter-leading tents with a King or two Twin beds in one suite and two Queen beds in the other. This suite accommodates up to four adults sharing or a maximum of five for families with children (exceptions may apply).
texts.text: Each Family Suite (168m 2 ) consists of two inter-leading tents with a King or two Twin beds in one suite and two Queen beds in the other. This suite accommodates up to four adults sharing or a maximum of five for families with children (exceptions may apply).

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Ishara is often visited by wildlife such as hippos, buffaloes, hyenas and even lions and leopards. Maasai  guards  will  accompany  you  as  you  move  around  camp  in  the  early  mornings,  late evenings or at night to assure safety from any wandering animals.
texts.text: Ishara is often visited by wildlife such as hippos, buffaloes, hyenas and even lions and leopards. Maasai  guards  will  accompany  you  as  you  move  around  camp  in  the  early  mornings,  late evenings or at night to assure safety from any wandering animals.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Our camp is best suited to host guests from the age of 8 years and above. Several of our suites and most parts of the camp are wheelchair accessible.
texts.text: Our camp is best suited to host guests from the age of 8 years and above. Several of our suites and most parts of the camp are wheelchair accessible.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Dining
texts.text: Dining

texts.label: text
texts.orig: At Ishara, food is a journey. It is an immersive experience that is as much about the moment, the occasion, and the joyful conversations amid this untamed wilderness as it is about the taste. With an eclectic mix of settings within the camp and in the Reserve, Ishara's poetic interpretations of the gastronomic experience conjure up an ambience to complement and enhance the fine dining and mindful cuisine offerings.
texts.text: At Ishara, food is a journey. It is an immersive experience that is as much about the moment, the occasion, and the joyful conversations amid this untamed wilderness as it is about the taste. With an eclectic mix of settings within the camp and in the Reserve, Ishara's poetic interpretations of the gastronomic experience conjure up an ambience to complement and enhance the fine dining and mindful cuisine offerings.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Each day offers a different selection to choose from and caters for various dietary requirements ( special dietary requirements must be communicated in advance ). Enjoy a tour of our aeroponic ' Shamba of  Goodness '  tower  farm  and  our  outdoor  kitchen  for  an  immersive  experience  that invites you to connect with the earth's bounty on a profoundly personal level, transforming fresh, farm-to-table ingredients into exquisite creations with our culinary team .
texts.text: Each day offers a different selection to choose from and caters for various dietary requirements ( special dietary requirements must be communicated in advance ). Enjoy a tour of our aeroponic ' Shamba of  Goodness '  tower  farm  and  our  outdoor  kitchen  for  an  immersive  experience  that invites you to connect with the earth's bounty on a profoundly personal level, transforming fresh, farm-to-table ingredients into exquisite creations with our culinary team .

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: The Photo Studio
texts.text: The Photo Studio

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Ishara and Canon have set up the first official Canon Brand Experience Centre in the Masai Mara,  a  world-class  interactive  and  artistic  space.  Complete  with  high-end  Canon  cameras, accessories,  binoculars,  photo  printers,  professional  photo  editing  suites  and  resident  pros, whether you are a professional or a first timer, Ishara and Canon give you the space to explore, learn, and hone your shooting skills.
texts.text: Ishara and Canon have set up the first official Canon Brand Experience Centre in the Masai Mara,  a  world-class  interactive  and  artistic  space.  Complete  with  high-end  Canon  cameras, accessories,  binoculars,  photo  printers,  professional  photo  editing  suites  and  resident  pros, whether you are a professional or a first timer, Ishara and Canon give you the space to explore, learn, and hone your shooting skills.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: The S t a rbed Ex p erience
texts.text: The S t a rbed Ex p erience

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The first of its kind in the Masai Mara, Ishara's Starbed Experience embodies the true meaning of  freedom  and  is  an  inimitable  way  to  embrace  nature.  Experience  a  spectacular  evening beneath the African night sky, below a blanket of stars. Elevated above ground on a private observation deck, you'll enjoy scenic views of vast plains stretching into the horizon and fig trees scattered along the river. From lions roaring at dusk and hippos frolicking in the water, to the lively  dawn birdsong and the gentle gurgle of the stream; close your eyes and experience the enchantment that is the Masai Mara night.
texts.text: The first of its kind in the Masai Mara, Ishara's Starbed Experience embodies the true meaning of  freedom  and  is  an  inimitable  way  to  embrace  nature.  Experience  a  spectacular  evening beneath the African night sky, below a blanket of stars. Elevated above ground on a private observation deck, you'll enjoy scenic views of vast plains stretching into the horizon and fig trees scattered along the river. From lions roaring at dusk and hippos frolicking in the water, to the lively  dawn birdsong and the gentle gurgle of the stream; close your eyes and experience the enchantment that is the Masai Mara night.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The Starbed now features a magnificent stone bathtub,  adding  to  the  allure  of  this  magical place and placing it firmly at the pinnacle of any safari bucket list.
texts.text: The Starbed now features a magnificent stone bathtub,  adding  to  the  allure  of  this  magical place and placing it firmly at the pinnacle of any safari bucket list.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Preserving our Home in the Masai Mara
texts.text: Preserving our Home in the Masai Mara

texts.label: text
texts.orig: We take pride in this place we call home and aim to not only preserve its natural beauty, but also  to  help  it  thrive.  Ishara  is  off-grid,  which  is  why  we  have  invested  in  a  180kWp  solarcultivating energy farm to generate renewable electricity.
texts.text: We take pride in this place we call home and aim to not only preserve its natural beauty, but also  to  help  it  thrive.  Ishara  is  off-grid,  which  is  why  we  have  invested  in  a  180kWp  solarcultivating energy farm to generate renewable electricity.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: An extensive rainwater harvesting system capable of collecting and storing up to 200,000 litres of fresh rainwater has been implemented at Ishara. Coupled with a water filtration plant, this supply  caters  to  the  hydro  needs  of  our  entire  camp.  A  Waste  Water  Treatment  Plant  from Bioliff Biorock© ensures that the waste can be reused safely for landscaping irrigation, outside cleaning and washing of vehicles. During harsh weather conditions or drought, a portion of the water from our harvested rainwater supply is pumped into our wildlife waterhole, guaranteeing a supply of safe drinking water for animals throughout the year.
texts.text: An extensive rainwater harvesting system capable of collecting and storing up to 200,000 litres of fresh rainwater has been implemented at Ishara. Coupled with a water filtration plant, this supply  caters  to  the  hydro  needs  of  our  entire  camp.  A  Waste  Water  Treatment  Plant  from Bioliff Biorock© ensures that the waste can be reused safely for landscaping irrigation, outside cleaning and washing of vehicles. During harsh weather conditions or drought, a portion of the water from our harvested rainwater supply is pumped into our wildlife waterhole, guaranteeing a supply of safe drinking water for animals throughout the year.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The first of its kind in the Masai Mara, our aeroponic Tower Farm grows fresh organic produce and uses 95% less water than traditional methods. This ensures minimal land degradation and does not affect the indigenous biodiversity of the flora native to the Mara ecosystem.
texts.text: The first of its kind in the Masai Mara, our aeroponic Tower Farm grows fresh organic produce and uses 95% less water than traditional methods. This ensures minimal land degradation and does not affect the indigenous biodiversity of the flora native to the Mara ecosystem.
